title: Pisos epoxi para salas de exposición de concesionarios - Elite Mexico
content:
Dealership Showrooms
Showrooms typically require a surface with high aesthetic value that can withstand heavy traffic. Our floors offer high durability, are antimicrobial and easy to clean and maintain. They are available in a variety of custom colors with the option to incorporate logos to match branding.
Advantages
Impact and abrasion resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Quick install, minimal downtime
Easy to clean and maintain
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair and/or protection
Extreme temperature resistances
Custom colors to match company colors and branding themes
Stain and chemical resistance
More cost-effective than terrazzo and most tile
Automotive dealerships
Marine
RV/Camper
Recreational motorsports
